interfaces.name: CustomGameEventDeclarations
interfaces.description:
The type used for validation of custom events.

This type may be augmented via interface merging.

members.name: Subscribe
members.signature: Subscribe<T extends string | object>( pEventName: (T extends string ? T : string) | keyof CustomGameEventDeclarations | keyof GameEventDeclarations, funcVal: (event: NetworkedData<GameEvents.InferGameEventType<T, object>>) => void, ): GameEventListenerID
members.description: Subscribe to a game event.
examples:
// Custom event with inline type definition
GameEvents.Subscribe<{ field: string }>("custom_event", event => $.Msg(event.field));

members.name: Unsubscribe
members.description: Unsubscribe from a game event.

members.name: SendCustomGameEventToServer
members.signature: SendCustomGameEventToServer<T extends string | object>( pEventName: (T extends string ? T : string) | keyof CustomGameEventDeclarations, eventData: GameEvents.InferCustomGameEventType<T, never>, ): void
members.description: Send a custom game event.
examples:
// Inline type definition
GameEvents.SendCustomGameEventToServer<{ field: string }>("custom_event", { field: "foo" });

members.name: SendCustomGameEventToAllClients
members.signature: SendCustomGameEventToAllClients<T extends string | object>( pEventName: (T extends string ? T : string) | keyof CustomGameEventDeclarations, eventData: GameEvents.InferCustomGameEventType<T, never>, ): void
members.description: Send a custom game event to the server, which will send it to all clients.

members.name: SendCustomGameEventToClient
members.signature: SendCustomGameEventToClient<T extends string | object>( pEventName: (T extends string ? T : string) | keyof CustomGameEventDeclarations, playerIndex: PlayerID, eventData: GameEvents.InferCustomGameEventType<T, never>, ): void
members.description: Send a custom game event to the server, which will send it to all clients.

members.name: SendEventClientSide
members.signature: SendEventClientSide<TName extends keyof GameEventDeclarations>( pEventName: TName, eventData: GameEventDeclarations[TName], ): void
members.description: Send a client-side event using gameeventmanager.

interfaces.name: CustomUIConfig
interfaces.description:
The type of `Game.CustomUIConfig()`.

If you need to declare that a given property exists in `Game.CustomUIConfig()`,
this type may be augmented via interface merging.

members.description: Control whether the default UI is enabled

members.description: Save persistent data used by an event game

members.name: CustomUIConfig
members.description: Get the current UI configuration

members.name: PingMinimapAtLocation
members.description: Create a minimap ping at the given location

members.description: Is the control button pressed?

members.description: Select a unit, adding it to the group or replacing the current selection.

members.description: Get the current look at position.

members.description: Get the current camera position.

members.description: Get the current look at position height offset.

members.description: Set the minimum camera pitch angle.

members.name: SetCameraPitchMax
members.description: Set the maximum camera pitch angle.

members.description: Set the camera's yaw.

members.description: Get the camera's yaw.

members.description: Offset the camera's look at point.

members.description: Set the camera from a lateral position.

members.name: SetCameraTerrainAdjustmentEnabled
members.description: Set whether the camera should automatically adjust to average terrain height.

members.name: SetCameraDistance
members.description: Set the camera distance from the look at point.

members.name: SetRenderBottomInsetOverride
members.description: Set the gap between the bottom of the screen and the game rendering viewport. (Value expressed as pixels in a normalized 1024x768 viewport.)

members.name: SetRenderTopInsetOverride
members.description: Set the gap between the top of the screen and the game rendering viewport. (Value expressed as pixels in a normalized 1024x768 viewport.)

members.name: SetCameraTarget
members.description: Set the camera target for the local player, or -1 to clear.

members.name: SetCameraTargetPosition
members.signature: SetCameraTargetPosition(vec3: [number, number, number], flLerp: number): void
members.description: Set the camera target as position for the local player over specified lerp.

members.name: MoveCameraToEntity
members.description: Moves the camera to an entity, but doesn't lock the camera on that entity.

members.name: WorldToScreenXYClamped
members.description: Converts the specified x,y,z world co-ordinate into an x,y screen coordinate. Will clamp position to always be in front of camera.  Position returned as 0->1.0

members.name: GetPlayerScoreboardScore
members.description: Get the current players scoreboard score for the specified zone.

members.name: SendCustomHUDError
members.description: Send a custom client side error message with passed string and soundevent.

members.name: ReplaceDOTAAbilitySpecialValues
members.description:
Given a passed ability, replace the special value variables in the passed localized text.
Returns `null` if `abilityName` is invalid.

members.description: Returns the localization token to use for a particular unit, given the unit's name.

members.name: GetUnitNameLocalized
members.description: Get the localized version of a unit's name.

members.name: ConstructNumberString
members.description: Creates a localized version of the number

members.name: AreTipsAvailable
members.description: Query to check if Tips are available for the local player

members.name: IsPlayerTippable
members.description: Query to see if the local player can tip a specific player

members.name: TipPlayer
members.description: Tip a player

members.name: DisplayCustomContextualTip
members.description: Display a custom contextual tip (wizard tip) with specific loc string and duration

members.name: SetupDOTATalentNameLabel
members.description: Set the text of a passed label for a DOTA Talent using ability values.

members.name: IsAbilityDOTATalent
members.description: Returns true if the passed ability is a talent.

interfaces.name: CustomNetTableDeclarations
interfaces.description:
The type used for validation of custom net tables.

This type may be augmented via interface merging.

members.name: GetTableValue
members.signature: GetTableValue< TName extends keyof CustomNetTableDeclarations, T extends CustomNetTableDeclarations[TName], K extends keyof T, >( pTableName: TName, pKeyName: K, ): NetworkedData<T[K]> | null
members.description: Get a key from a custom net table

members.name: GetAllTableValues
members.signature: GetAllTableValues<TName extends keyof CustomNetTableDeclarations, T extends CustomNetTableDeclarations[TName]>( pTableName: TName, ): { [K in keyof T]: { key: K; value: NetworkedData<T[K]> } }[keyof T][]
members.description: Get all values from a custom net table

members.name: SubscribeNetTableListener
members.signature: SubscribeNetTableListener< TName extends keyof CustomNetTableDeclarations, T extends CustomNetTableDeclarations[TName], >( tableName: TName, callback: (tableName: TName, key: keyof T, value: NetworkedData<T[keyof T]>) => void, ): NetTableListenerID
members.description: Register a callback when a particular custom net table changes

members.name: UnsubscribeNetTableListener
members.description: Unsubscribe from a game event

members.description: Create a particle from a file with an attachment and an owning entity.

members.name: ReleaseParticleIndex
members.description:
Release the index of a particle, will make the particle in-accessible from script. This allows another particle
to reuse the freed particle index.

members.name: DestroyParticleEffect
members.description: Destroy a particle. Setting the immediate boolean to true will prevent the endcap from playing.

members.name: SetParticleControl
members.signature: SetParticleControl(particle: ParticleID, controlPoint: number, value: [number, number, number]): void
members.description: Set a particle's control point to a vector value.

members.name: SetParticleControlForward
members.signature: SetParticleControlForward(particle: ParticleID, controlPoint: number, value: [number, number, number]): void
members.description: [OBSOLETE - Use SetParticleControlTransformForward] Set the orientation on a control point on a particle system

members.name: SetParticleControlTransform
members.signature: SetParticleControlTransform( particle: ParticleID, controlPoint: number, origin: [number, number, number], angles: [number, number, number], ): void
members.description: Set the position and orientation on a control point on a particle system.

members.name: SetParticleControlTransformForward
members.signature: SetParticleControlTransformForward( particle: ParticleID, controlPoint: number, origin: [number, number, number], forward: [number, number, number], ): void
members.description: Set the position and orientation (derived from a forward direction) on a control point on a particle system

members.name: SetParticleAlwaysSimulate
members.description: Unknown use, any info welcome.

members.name: SetParticleControlEnt
members.signature: SetParticleControlEnt( particle: ParticleID, controlPoint: number, entity: EntityIndex, particleAttach: ParticleAttachment_t, attachmentName: string, offset: [number, number, number], unknown: boolean, ): void
members.description: Set a particle's control point to an entity's attachment.
